'''R2-D5''' was a multiple use [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2]] unit used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It generally worked as an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]], but could also be used as a [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]]. Its versatility made it an essential part of almost all technical aspects, from gathering resources like extracting and processing [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]], to repairing and building structures.

==Models==
There was a variety of models of R2-D5:
*'''Regular''': The regular model had the same basic design as any other [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]].

*'''Carbon Collector''': [[File:R2-D5_Carbon_Collector.png|thumb|right|R2-D5 Carbon Collector]] The Carbon Collector was similar in design to other R2-series astromech droid models, but possessed a container for storing extracted [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] at its rear. It was frequently used to [[Mining/Legends|mine]] and deliver carbon [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] for processing.

*'''Nova Carrier/Ore Collector''': The Nova Carrier/Ore Collector's legs were extended outward to allow for a carrier at the front. It was used to carry extracted [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]] and various [[Ore/Legends|ores]].

*'''Fisher''': The [[Fisher/Legends|Fisher]] model's head contained a large mechanical arm. It would use this arm to drop a [[Net/Legends|net]] into a body of [[Water/Legends|water]], then reel up any marine lifeforms that the net ensnared.

*'''Builder/Repairer''': [[File:R2-D5_Builder_Repairer.png|thumb|R2-D5 Builder/Repairer]] The Builder/Repairer model was equipped with several tools used for construction and/or repair work.

*'''Farmer model''': The [[Farmer/Legends|Farmer]] model had a front-facing sprinkler on top of its head, which it used to water [[Plant/Legends|plants]] for use for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] supplies.

*'''Hunter model''': Similar to the Carbon Collector, the Hunter was equipped with a container. Unlike the other model, though, the Hunter used its container to store animals it had [[Death/Legends|killed]]. It killed these animals using an attached weapon that ended the life of any prey it found.

*'''Herder model''': The Herder model had several arms in front of it to sway various fauna into following it.

==Behind the scenes==
[[R2-Q5/Legends|R2-Q5]] was accidentally named R2-D5 in the [[LEGO]] 6211 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]].
